title: Approval Auditor
body: Scan and identify dangerous ERC-20 token approvals to revoke from any wallet.

title: Bridge Security Monitor
body: Monitor bridge contracts for unusual outflows, signature reuse, and validator anomalies.

title: Compliance Transaction Screening
body: Screen transactions and wallets for OFAC, sanctions, and AML compliance requirements.

title: Contract Interaction History
body: Full history of contract interactions for security forensics and incident response.

title: Exploit Early Warning System
body: Real-time detection of exploit patterns — large outflows, drain sequences, and abnormal contract calls.

title: MEV Exposure Analyzer
body: Quantify a wallet's exposure to MEV — value extracted via sandwich attacks and front-running.

title: MEV Monitor
body: Detect sandwich attacks, front-running, and MEV bot activity in real time.

title: Oracle Manipulation Detector
body: Detect oracle price manipulation attempts via flash-loan patterns and block-level price deviations.

title: Phishing Address Checker
body: Check addresses against known phishing, scam, and exploit databases onchain.

title: Phishing Wallet Database
body: Query a continuously updated onchain database of phishing and scam wallets.

title: Rugpull Pattern Detector
body: Identify rugpull signals — LP removal, ownership renounce reversals, and concentrated exits.

title: Smart Contract Interaction Risk
body: Score the risk of interacting with any smart contract based on its onchain history and approvals.

title: Token Approval Risk Scanner
body: Scan all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet and score each by risk level — identify dangerous unlimited approvals, deprecated protocols, and known exploited contracts.

title: Token Risk Analyzer
body: Score tokens for rug-pull signals, ownership concentration, and LP lock status.

title: Transaction Decoded Receipt
body: Fetch a fully decoded transaction receipt including internal transfers, decoded log events, ERC-20/NFT movements, and gas analytics — the core of any transaction detail page.
